subcodes.title: Words spoken at Hearst estate in Pleasanton, 1912-10-13
subcodes.first_line: Every universal matter is from God; and limitations are from man.
subcodes.first_line_orig: هر امر عمومی الهی است و هر امر خصوصی بشری لهذا خدمات و زحمات نفوس اگر مفید بحال عموم
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God and human limitations, @universality of the Cause, @the ephemeral and the eternal, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
